item.title: F*** it, good enough! Down 65 lbs and feel good... not perfect by any stretch but i think this is about right
item.description:
15 short of my original goal, but feel like this is a reasonable place to land. Still got the pixar butt, that's mine forever
215. Never again. Everything hurt all the time and I hid from cameras for years.
item.dc:creator: RufusTheThirteenthApostle

item.title: Dump of amazing tools, techniques and allsorts that engineers and technicians may find amazing. I removed most disgraceful musics but not all because the original sound was mixed and attracting. Have a nice Sunday. Here it rains. So no Sun. Haha. Enjoy.
item.description:
How the Netherlands cope with tides
2. Assembling an engine
3. Laser etching notches on a circular dial
4. Satisfied sealcoating
5. Use that feet
6. How they fix road cracks in Sweden
7. Waking up an Airbus A320N
8. full-automatic car umbrella
9. Shower set
10. Goodbye charging stations, Norway unveiled the wireless charging road.
11. A ship that never capsize
12. Steam cleaning of a mattress
13. Will you sit on a bar chair again ?
14. Gravel Leveling Hack.
15. Changing a bulb .
16. This Double Maze Copper Lock has been used in China for more than 2 000 years as security systems.
17. Lighter.
18. Cnc carving groot sculpture .
19. Tying machine.
20. "well" done .
21. One fork to rule them all .
22. awesome .
23. Removal of excess cardboard edge.
24. Hauling a substation transformer.
25. The Super Guppy has largest cargo compartment of any aircraft ever built .
26. Hydraulic scrap metal guillotine shear.
27. This epoxyfloor process.
28. Amazing diy tool .

item.title: Suburban box truck explosion
item.description: Penske box truck exploding in Addison, IL this morning on Wood Dale Rd. The fire department says four homes were damaged and one was left uninhabitable. They say one of the walls of the box truck hit the front facing wall of the home pushing it 2-4 feet inward. Debris spilled out for one to two blocks including clothes and furniture. The homeowners were inside at the time but are not hurt according to fire. Officials say the driver of the truck was seen walking around the truck when responders arrived. They say the cause was a propane tank leak. Driver was taken to the hospital with THANKFULLY non life threatening injuries. https://abc7chicago.com/post/truck-explosion-addison-illinois-cleanup-continues-propane-tank-wood-dale-road-lake-street/16541290/

item.title: After all, why not? Why shouldn’t I make room on my phone by dumping memes? Volume 24
item.description:
Hey y’all!
Facts! Source: am girl with thick thighs and loud laugh…am important…or maybe that’s impatient…idk
Please let me go home and be by myself
Ok but I love Sixlets!
I know my neighbor’s dog’s name (hey Olive!) but not my neighbor’s name
Fuck!
This is me and it’s fucking exhausting
Stay fresh, cheesebags!

item.title: Staying Alive
item.description:
He might be a virgin, but he's also a survival expert.
This comic has been made possible by our supporters on Patreon. While millions enjoy our work for free, it’s your generosity that keeps the gears turning. Thanks to you, we can focus on creating without hustling on the side. We’re endlessly grateful. PS: https://www.patreon.com/warandpeas

item.title: What Happened Today #114
item.description: Even Memorial Day weekend can't slow the unraveling. Trump turned West Point's sacred graduation into a MAGA rally while claiming he's more investigated than Al Capone, his son launched a "library" slush fund seeded with settlement money squeezed from ABC and Meta, and EPA officially declared climate science fiction to eliminate all power plant emissions limits. The erosion of American norms doesn't take holidays - and neither can our resistance to it. Meanwhile, don't rely on the algorithm. Let me send this free and private summary to you every night so that you never miss what's going on. Add your email on the homepage of GovBrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/americans-british-citizens 2. https://go.govbrief.today/eliminate-greenhouse-gas-limits 3. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-west-point 4. https://go.govbrief.today/doge-interior-blm 5. https://go.govbrief.today/library-eric-trump 6. https://go.govbrief.today/military-national-airport Yesterday's Story - https://go.govbrief.today/nuclear-regulatory-commission Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/seattle-counterprotests
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Gay Memes for you because it's been a while
item.description: So it's been a while since I dug into the gay meme vault for my LGBT memelords consumption.
item.dc:creator: gayvillian

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1371 (The Glorious Revolution of the 25th of May)
item.description:
Welcome to a very special Discworld Post. The Glorious Revolution of the 25th of May is featured in Night Watch. All the little angels rise up, rise up. All the little angels rise up high! How do they rise up, rise up, rise up? How do they rise up, rise up high? They rise heads up, heads up, heads up, they rise heads up, heads up high! "The dwarf bread was brought out for inspection. But it was miraculous, the dwarf bread. No one ever went hungry when they had some dwarf bread to avoid. You only had to look at it for a moment, and instantly, you could think of dozens of things you'd rather eat. Your boots, for example. Mountains. Raw sheep. Your own foot."
Truth! Justice! Freedom! Reasonably Priced Love! And a Hard-Boiled Egg!
I seem to recall I was supposed to tag @Feralkyn when I posted this, but I don't remember if anyone else wanted to be tagged.
I can honestly say that reading Terry Pratchett at the same time I was reading books written on social justice by 4th century saints (like Basil the Great) in the late Roman Empire shaped me into being the kind of faithful person I am.
"...tomorrow the sun will come up again, and I’m pretty sure that whatever happens we won’t have found Freedom, and there won’t be a whole lot of Justice, and I’m damn sure we won’t have found Truth. But it’s just possible that I might get a hard-boiled egg."-- Sam Vimes.
Night Watch is probably the most pertinent book for society right now. It is, in my opinion, his absolute Magnum Opus. Penguin classics just released an annotated edition in the UK I'm excited to dig into, even though I've already read Night Watch for like the 12th time just after the November election.
This is not an actual Discworld reference, but this is VERY on-brand for Sir Samuel Vimes, Duke of Ankh, and Blackboard Monitor. He's very anti-authoritarian despite being an authority.
I actually bought myself a degree from The Discworld Emporium in Cruel and Unusual Geography. I figured living in Arizona, having lead tours through some of these landscapes, and exploring it thoroughly since i was a kid naturally gave that degree, after all. I can't wait to frame it and hang it on my wall.
Honestly? The Summoning Dark or the Guarding Dark might be a future tattoo.
So: where do you begin with 41 books? Wherever you want. I recommend Mort, Small Gods, or Guards! Guards!, myself, but there really isn't a bad place. I will say that Night Watch is my absolute favorite. Carpe Jugulum is up there, along with Small Gods. I was lucky enough to meet him before he passed.
The only reason I have kept my copy of Good Omens is because it was autographed by him.
Sorry that some of these are missing pixels.
I have to say the mindsets of Tiffany Aching and Sam Vimes have really influenced how and why I'm fighting in my own small ways the tide of fascism in America.
Knowing things is magical.
This quote sits heavily in my mind. I feel Granny Weatherwax and Terry Pratchett ask me this every day.
SAUSSSAGE INNNA BUN! I'm planning on having some sausage Inna bun at the church picnic this afternoon. It will be hard to explain why I'm laughing so hard.
This did not stop me when I was writing my thesis. I had both academic situations and snarky commentary about Byzantine theology and economics in my footnotes for my thesis. My professors loved it, actually.
Fellow Americans, please do not fall into this trap. Legal doesn't necessarily mean morally proper.
I am proud to be part of this Fandom kaiju.
Pippin tax! Here, he is on a box of treats I ordered from the Discworld Emporium. Today's message from Pippin: "peekaboo! Okay. What Pippin? What the fuck? Pippin! What? [Disembodied conure scream]" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 5) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett
